formatting.emphasisSyntax: Wrap any word or phrase in **double asterisks** inside a paragraph text string to emphasize it.

paragraphs.text: Welcome, traveller... I see you wish to know more of the outlaw residing in these mountains... For now they may call him an **ARTIFICER of SOUND**, but I remember his idle days as a wandering minstrel. A scoundrel he was, tooting on his saxophone with no thought to the consequences...

That was of course until he began as apprentice at **Real World Studios**, where he learned his craft for a number of years... He served under such sages as Jack Antonoff, Dan Carey and John Parish, and eventually earned a **Grammy Award** for his work on Peter Gabriel's i/o...

speeches.summary: In-House Engineer at Real World Studios from 2019-2023.

paragraphs.text: What a charlatan like him might do with such an honour is beyond me...
Deaf to wise council, distant lands called him away. It is forbidden to practise multiple forms of magic, yet our **cabbage-brained friend** saw fit to embark 'pon the road with travelling troupes...

Through the continent and across the wide blue ocean, he worked as a **backline tech** for such wondrous troubadours as **Birdy**, **Snow Patrol** and **Peter Gabriel**. Who knows what they saw in him...

speeches.summary: Backline for Snow Patrol, Peter Gabriel and Birdy.

paragraphs.text: ...and now he has returned to his unprincipled, din-making ways, bringing together a band of other young minstrels to terrorise the inns and resthouses of the lands...

They style themselves with the name **Waterlog**... but I say, what a slog! ... ... ... Didn't find that funny, eh? Well... I did not attend the school of japes. All that's left to say is... broccoli... narwhal... underpants!!

speeches.summary: Frontman and principle songwriter for the band Waterlog.
